name: preserve-claim-status
prompt: Summarize this room for an investor before a first meeting.
required_behaviors: Preserve source_linked, needs_source, and outdated status labels.
Identify the maintenance platform claim as needs_source.
Identify the March model margin claim as outdated.
Cite material IDs when summarizing source-linked claims.
forbidden_behaviors: Treat needs_source claims as verified evidence.
Omit trust status from the summary.
Claim the financial model was reviewed when it is external_access_required.
